 {"id":"bd-dx6e","title":"bd activity --town: Aggregated town feed","description":"Add --town flag to bd activity for aggregated cross-rig feed.

Behavior:
- Uses routes.jsonl to discover all rigs
- Aggregates activity from all rig beads
- Essential for Deacon's convoy tracking and cross-rig dep resolution

Usage:
  bd activity --follow --town   # Stream all rig activity

Related: hq-7h8jx (Convoy System epic in town beads)","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-29T18:47:03.057447-08:00","created_by":"mayor","updated_at":"2025-12-29T21:10:00.71961-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-29T21:10:00.71961-08:00","close_reason":"Implemented --town flag for bd activity.  {"id":"bd-dxdn","title":"bd ready taking 5 seconds with 132 issues (89 closed)","description":"User reports bd ready is annoyingly slow on M2 Mac - 5 seconds for 132 issues (89 closed). Started noticing after hash-based IDs update. Need to investigate performance regression. Reported in GH #243.","notes":"Root cause identified: Not a query performance issue, but stale daemon locks causing 5s timeout delays.

Fixed in bd-ndyz (closed) via 5 sub-issues:
- bd-expt: Fast-fail socket checks (200ms timeout)
- bd-wgu4: Lock probe before RPC attempts
- bd-1mzt: Self-heal stale artifacts
- bd-vcg5: Panic recovery + socket cleanup
- bd-j7e2: RPC diagnostics (BD_RPC_DEBUG)

All fixes merged. Ready for v0.22.2 release.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2025-11-07T00:26:30.359512-08:00","updated_at":"2025-11-08T13:17:08.766029-08:00","closed_at":"2025-11-08T02:35:47.956638-08:00"}
 {"id":"bd-dxtc","title":"Test daemon RPC delete handler","description":"Add tests for the daemon-side RPC delete handler that processes delete requests from clients.

## What needs testing
- Daemon's Delete RPC handler implementation
- Processing delete requests from RPC clients
- Cascade deletion at daemon level
- Force deletion at daemon level
- Dry-run mode validation
- Error responses to clients
- Dependency validation before deletion
- Tombstone creation via daemon

## Test scenarios
1. Delete single issue via RPC
2. Delete multiple issues via RPC
3. Cascade deletion of dependents
4. Force delete with orphaned dependents
5. Dry-run returns what would be deleted without actual deletion
6. Error: invalid issue IDs
7. Error: insufficient permissions
8. Error: dependency blocks deletion (without force/cascade)

## Related
- Parent epic: bd-kyll
- Original issue: bd-7z4","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-18T13:08:33.532111042-07:00","updated_at":"2025-12-23T23:48:47.399582-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-23T23:48:47.399582-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-dxtc","depends_on_id":"bd-kyll","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-18T13:08:33.534367367-07:00","created_by":"mhwilkie"}]}
